author: rotifer-petri
description: Dual-layer evolution engine: micro-evolution (data-driven per-pipeline parameter adjustment) and macro-evolution (Population-Based Training weekly cycle). Pure computation over historical performance data.

mode.description: micro = per-pipeline delta update; macro = weekly PBT population selection

funds.description: FundConfig objects for which to run evolution

results.description: MicroEvolveResult objects with updated strategy parameters

report.description: EvolutionReport summarizing generation statistics and winning variants

transparency.note: Macro-evolution uses stochastic selection (PBT); micro-evolution is deterministic given same performance history. Reads historical trade records to compute fitness scores.
